label: bird
groundingNote: an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; many of them are small; it can move far above the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m], it can move in the {urn:molecule-v0:sky|sky} [m]; people can hear some of them at many times, this can feel good
notes: NSM molecule 'bird' (Goddard 2010); flight is the recognition feature.
